results.title: Kerala govt plans PPP model for J.C. Daniel international film city proposed in revised Budget
results.description: Kerala government plans a PPP model for J.C. Daniel international film city, aiming to boost film production in Ernakulam.

results.title: 'Days after Terry Hall died he walked towards me' - bandmate reveals jaw-dropping moment - Daily Express
results.description: 'Days after Terry Hall died he walked towards me' - bandmate reveals jaw-dropping moment Daily Express

results.title: 'Days after Terry Hall died he walked towards me' - bandmate reveals jaw-dropping moment
results.description: Terry Hall was gone for days but his smile showed up where grief was supposed to live and it left a calm behind that still feels impossible.

results.title: Local 12 Abandons Its Weekend Newscasts
results.description: The Sinclair Inc.-owned CBS affiliate serving Southern Ohio and Northern Kentucky will be airing its final local weekend newscasts on July 18 and 19, concluding 35 years of Saturday and Sunday coverage of Cincinnati and its surrounding communities.
